title: Mouse Genotyping with KAPA Kit
author: Cq Wu
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bbxnipme

steps.title: Collect mouse tissues (ear or tail clips) into PCR strips
steps.instruction: Collect mouse tissues (ear or tail clips) into PCR strips.

steps.title: Make 100 µL extration buffer mix for each sample
steps.instruction: Make 100 µL extration buffer mix for each sample. %s %s

steps.title: Add 100 µL buffer into each...
steps.instruction: Add 100 µL buffer into each tissue sample and run the reaction as follows: 75 °C 00:15:00 95 °C 00:05:00 4 °C 00:00:00 Tissues are visible or intact after extraction (this is normal). Vortex DNA extract and spin down before PCR.

steps.title: Make 20 µL PCR master mix for each sample
steps.instruction: Make 20 µL PCR master mix for each sample. %s %s

steps.title: Run the reaction as follows
steps.instruction: Run the reaction as follows: 95 °C 00:03:00 35 cycles 95 °C 00:00:15 57 °C, adjustable 00:00:15 72 °C 00:00:10, per kb 35 cycles 4 °C 00:00:00

steps.title: Take 10 µL PCR reaction and run DNA gel
steps.instruction: Take 10 µL PCR reaction and run DNA gel.
